mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_notices n
AND (n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR n.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.author_id, n.visibility, n.view_required, n.view_count, n.created_at, n.updated_at, u.name AS author_name, CASE WHEN nv.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_viewed FROM gw_notices n JOIN itsm_users u ON n.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_notice_views nv ON nv.notice_id = n.id AND nv.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_notices (title, content, author_id, visibility, view_required) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{visibility}, #{viewRequired})
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_notices SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, visibility = #{visibility}, view_required = #{viewRequired}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE gw_notices SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_notice_views (notice_id, user_id) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (notice_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
